name: Pasticcio Di Maccheroni
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------BECHAMEL SAUCE-------------------------------
3 tablespoons Butter
Salt and pepper to taste
1/4 cup Flour
2 Egg yolks
1 liter Milk
Saute the onion, green onion, celery, and carrot in the butter until tender. Add the salt, pepper, ground beef, and a few spoons of water. Saute for a few minutes and add the tomatoes. Simmer for 30 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the beaten egg whites.
Boil 4 liters of water with a pinch of salt. Cook macaroni until al dente (about 10 minutes). Drain well.
Prepare the Bechamel Sauce: In a saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons butter and add flour. Stir over low heat until smooth. Gradually add milk, whisking constantly with a wire whisk or electric mixer. Continue cooking until thickened. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper (optional nutmeg). Beat egg yolks, then stir in some hot sauce. Add the yokes to the remaining sauce, mixing well.
Place butter in macaroni. Spread half of the pasta in a rectangular baking dish, sprinkle generously with cheese, and cover with meat. Place remaining pasta on top and cover with cheese. Pour Bechamel Sauce over everything. Bake for about 40 minutes at medium oven temperature. Cut into squares when slightly cooled and serve.
Source: Misko Ltd. Athens Greece Translation by: Karen Mintzias
